description: In the E-Commerce Platform project, establish a scheduling dependency between two work packages to ensure proper sequencing. Configure 'Implement product recommendation engine' to follow 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' with a lag of exactly 2 days. Add a comment to the 'Implement product recommendation engine' work package explaining the dependency: "Dependency: Recommendation engine requires the Elasticsearch search index to be fully implemented and stabilized before development can begin." You are logged in as admin at http://localhost:8080/projects/ecommerce-platform/work_packages.
